workflows.title: Slack message → OpenAI → Notion page
workflows.description: When a message with a 📝 reaction is added in Slack, the message text is sent to OpenAI for summarisation and a new Notion page is created with the result.

workflows.title: Gmail meeting request → Claude → Calendar suggestion
workflows.description: Email with 'meeting' or 'call' in the body triggers Claude to detect intent, propose 3 calendar slots from your availability, and reply with a Calendly link.

workflows.title: Stripe new customer → LLM kickoff brief → CS workspace
workflows.description: Every new Stripe customer triggers an LLM-generated welcome brief (with their industry context) and creates a Notion CS workspace page with the brief embedded.

workflows.title: Typeform → enrich → Airtable
workflows.description: New Typeform submission → AI infers missing fields (size, industry) → row written to Airtable with full context.

workflows.title: Shopify order → OpenAI → Klaviyo segment
workflows.description: New Shopify order → AI categorises customer behaviour → adds to right Klaviyo segment for post-purchase email.

workflows.title: Calendly booking → Claude → HubSpot deal
workflows.description: New Calendly booking → Claude extracts meeting context → creates HubSpot deal with stage='discovery'.

workflows.title: Typeform survey → OpenAI synthesis → Mailchimp
workflows.description: Survey responses → AI synthesises themes → personalised follow-up email sequence in Mailchimp.

workflows.title: Stripe failed payment → Claude → Slack escalation
workflows.description: Stripe payment.failed → Claude drafts customer-friendly recovery email + risk assessment → Slack ping the CS lead.

workflows.title: Airtable record → OpenAI → Mailchimp campaign
workflows.description: Airtable record update → OpenAI generates campaign copy → creates draft Mailchimp campaign for review.

workflows.title: ClickUp task overdue → OpenAI → Slack nudge
workflows.description: Daily check: ClickUp tasks past due → OpenAI drafts a kind reminder per task → DM to the assignee.

workflows.title: Google Form intake → Claude triage → Zendesk ticket
workflows.description: New Google Forms intake → Claude classifies (bug/feature/billing/other) → creates Zendesk ticket with right priority.

workflows.title: Discord message → OpenAI sentiment → Airtable log
workflows.description: Community Discord channel messages → OpenAI extracts sentiment + topic → logs to Airtable for weekly review.

workflows.title: Google Sheets row → OpenAI → Mailgun send
workflows.description: New row in 'send-list' Google Sheet → OpenAI personalises body using row data → Mailgun sends.

workflows.title: Twilio SMS reply → Claude → HubSpot note
workflows.description: Customer SMS reply → Claude extracts intent + drafts response → response sent + activity logged on HubSpot contact.

workflows.title: Google Doc → OpenAI → Google Slides deck
workflows.description: Long-form Google Doc → OpenAI structures into slide-by-slide outline → creates a new Google Slides deck.

workflows.title: Pipedrive deal won → OpenAI → Gmail kickoff email
workflows.description: Deal moves to 'won' in Pipedrive → OpenAI drafts an onboarding kickoff email → Gmail draft created.

workflows.title: Monday.com status change → OpenAI summary → Slack
workflows.description: Status column changes in Monday.com → OpenAI generates a 1-paragraph context summary → posts to relevant Slack channel.

workflows.title: GA4 anomaly → Claude analysis → Notion entry
workflows.description: Daily GA4 check for traffic anomalies → Claude analyses cause hypothesis → creates Notion 'incidents' database entry for the marketing team.
